items.title: Iran and Israel say they have halted strikes after first exchange of fire since truce
items.summary: Iran launched about 30 missiles at Israel following a strike in Lebanon, while Israel carried out two waves of air strikes in Iran.

items.title: Iran's strike on Israel suggests the regime's sense of resilience is growing
items.summary: Iran's decision to risk jeopardising peace talks may reflect how its leaders view their current position, writes BBC Persian editor Amir Azimi.

items.title: At least 35 dead after major earthquake strikes southern Philippines
items.summary: The magnitude-7.8 quake triggered small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia and Japan.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 古巴西部外海6.1地震民眾驚逃　傳佛州也有感
items.summary: 古巴西部外海今天發生強烈地震，美國地質調查所（USGS）通報規模6.1。據報民眾驚慌逃到屋外，遠至美國佛羅里達州也有震感。  法新社記者在古巴首都哈瓦那報導說，地震持續約20秒，民眾奪門而出...…

items.title: 美控協助中國軍方　阿里巴巴百度比亞迪列黑名單
items.summary: 美國五角大廈今天公布美方認為正在協助中國軍方的中國企業新增名單，電子商務集團阿里巴巴、網路搜尋引擎巨擘百度以及汽車製造商比亞迪（BYD）等入列。  路透社報導，五角大廈2月一度公布更新名單，...…

items.title: 以伊交火後川普致電　尼坦雅胡稱敵對行動停止
items.summary: 以色列和伊朗自4月停火以來首度交火，白宮官員表示美國總統川普今天致電以色列總理尼坦雅胡。尼坦雅胡說，以色列對伊朗的空襲已阻止伊朗進一步攻擊，致使兩國停止敵對行動。  法新社報導，近來傳出川普...…
